response: This code implements the **merge sort algorithm**, a stable divide-and-conquer sorting algorithm that recursively splits the input array into left and right halves until each subarray has 0 or 1 elements (the inherently sorted base case). The `merge` helper function uses a two-pointer technique to combine two sorted subarrays into a single sorted array by iteratively taking the smaller (or equal) remaining element from each subarray, then appending any leftover elements once one subarray is exhausted.
